acceptance_targets: [ch17-booker-001] PASS if revised text anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:313, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:331, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:387, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:451 shows at least two specific institutional blockers (for example chain challenge, timestamp dispute, judge hesitation) and links each major outcome to an on-page action that overcomes a blocker; FAIL if outcomes still land as uninterrupted declarative calls.

[ch17-craft-001] PASS if revised text anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:389, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:391, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:397, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:403 includes direct sensory evidence of Deshawn's post-release state (voice, breathing, movement, or visible condition) plus one concrete detention consequence (medical, legal, or social) observed in-scene; FAIL if release remains only secondhand report.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised text anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:313, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:331, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:387, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:451 shows at least two specific institutional blockers (for example chain challenge, timestamp dispute, judge hesitation) and links each major outcome to an on-page action that overcomes a blocker; FAIL if outcomes still land as uninterrupted declarative calls.
findings.problem: Major reversals (federal intake alignment, Deshawn's release, and formal dual-track opening) arrive as a rapid phone-call cascade with minimal on-page resistance, so consequence feels announced rather than fought for. This compresses causal struggle at the exact moment the chapter should show institutional drag.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the diner escalation anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:313, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:331, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:387, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:451 so each outcome is preceded by a concrete obstacle and a visible counteraction. Keep the same end state, but add at least one failed or delayed step before Deshawn's release and before Turner confirms dual-track opening.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised text anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:389, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:391, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:397, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:403 includes direct sensory evidence of Deshawn's post-release state (voice, breathing, movement, or visible condition) plus one concrete detention consequence (medical, legal, or social) observed in-scene; FAIL if release remains only secondhand report.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift: the chapter treats Deshawn's wrongful-detention release as reported information and quippy aftermath instead of rendering embodied consequence. A high-cost human event is reduced to phone summary at the payoff beat.
findings.rewrite_direction: Expand the release beat anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:389, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:391, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:397, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:403 with an on-page consequence moment (direct call from Deshawn or immediate physical encounter) that includes bodily/emotional specificity and one material aftereffect of detention, while preserving pacing into the affidavit turn.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the version that preserves uncomfortable specificity and character accountability; do not replace difficult scenes with procedural summary, and do not mute class, race, sexuality, or institutional cruelty when those forces are actively shaping choices.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene with violence, racism, grief, or moral compromise is rendered in abstract or polite shorthand, revise to restore specific bodily, social, and material consequence before accepting the draft.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in contemporary Mississippi speech; uncontracted forms are reserved for formality, emphasis, or social performance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: rotate structural textures across chapters: procedural surge, quiet domestic interval, document-driven slow burn, dread preparation, aftermath inventory, and information-turn chapters; avoid repeating scene count plus dialogue density pattern in adjacent chapters.
prose_style_profile.diction: literary but grounded; precise legal and forensic terms when needed, balanced by lived vernacular and local material detail.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored primarily to Lena, with brief controlled expansions only when factual clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternate compressed procedural sentences with longer sensory-emotional lines so pressure and reflection keep rebalancing.
